task_objective: Resolve code review findings: release service state lock during HTTP network fetch in candidate revalidation, and make updater service tests independent of global mock decky import state.
design_decisions: Refactored revalidate_plugin_update to split locked sections (reading/writing rate-limit cooldown metadata under service._state_lock) from unlocked sections (making fetch_json HTTP network requests and candidate release/manifest validations). Modified test_decky_settings_store_defaults to take monkeypatch and mock the decky module in sys.modules, allowing test_updater_service.py to run in isolation.
results: All validation checks passed, all 431 tests pass cleanly, formatting and type checking verify successfully.
